structure.unit: Warehouses, Cold Storage and Refrigerated Locker Plants

law.catch_line: Issue of receipt for goods not received
law.text: A warehouseman, or any officer, agent or servant of a warehouseman, who issues or aids in issuing a receipt knowing that the goods for which such receipt is issued have not been actually received by such warehouseman, or are not under his actual control at the time of issuing such receipt, shall be guilty of a misdemeanor, and shall be punished as provided in § 18.2-12.
